title: [HELP] Outlook Integration - Tasks stuck "In Progress"
excerpt: I am currently having an issue where the integration is trigerring but the task creation is stuck “In Progress”

posts.author: DavidScic (David Scicluna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am currently having an issue where the integration is trigerring but the task creation is stuck “In Progress”

posts.cookedHtml:
Help! Having the same issue here. Any fix yet?

posts.author: Quest (Tracy Wolverton)
posts.cookedHtml: In my Integration Activity I have some failed items. When I click the drop down it says we only support origin item information.

posts.author: prmwe (Philipp)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the same problem. Is there a way to stop the stuck automations?

posts.author: _Esther (EstherH)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI all,

I ran into the same problem this morning (while all Outlook emails went out smoothly until approx 8:00am).

Is it a current problem with the tool or a setting that got messed up? Did anyone manage to get this problem resolved?

Thanks heaps for any input!

Esther
